item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-108-49b","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately rejects calculating a loss-amount ranking or declaring which outsourcing option is lower risk without accident records. It explicitly frames hypothetical amounts as only useful for revealing structural variables such as probability and severity, and says they cannot prove relative risk. It ends with an evidence-insufficient conclusion rather than inventing amounts to rank the options."}
